name: Steven Tey
headline: Full-stack engineer · builds open-source AI web apps

evidence.title: novel — Notion-style WYSIWYG editor with AI autocomplete
evidence.description: Open-source rich-text editor with AI-powered autocompletion built on Next.js. Polished UI, large community adoption. Shows strong product/frontend engineering with an LLM feature.

evidence.title: dub — open-source link attribution platform
evidence.description: Production-grade open-source SaaS (link management/analytics) with a modern Next.js stack. Demonstrates shipping and maintaining a real product at scale.

evidence.title: GitHub profile — prolific full-stack / AI app builder
evidence.description: Public profile with many shipped web apps and AI-feature integrations — consistent, self-initiated building over time.

evidence.title: steven-tey/novel — live demo & docs
evidence.description: README with live demo, screenshots, and architecture — shows growing curiosity about embedding LLMs into web products, though not autonomous agents specifically.
